data.title: Criteria Caixa Denies Negotiations Over Naturgy Stake
data.description:
Naturgy Energy Group, S.A. ( (ES:NTGY) ) just unveiled an update.

Criteria Caixa, S.A., a sole proprietorship, has clarified that it is not currently in negotiations with any potential investor group regarding its stake in Naturgy Energy Group, S.A. This announcement aims to address recent media speculation and provides assurance to stakeholders about the current status of ownership discussions.

More about Naturgy Energy Group, S.A.

Naturgy Energy Group, S.A. operates in the energy sector, focusing on the production and distribution of natural gas and electricity. The company is involved in various energy-related services and has a significant presence in both domestic and international markets.

data.title: Mogotes Metals Initiates Geophysical Survey at Promising New Claims
data.description:
An announcement from Mogotes Metals Inc. ( (TSE:MOG) ) is now available.

Mogotes Metals Inc. has commenced a geophysical survey on newly optioned claims near the Filo del Sol deposit, aiming to explore extensions of its undrilled Meseta and Cumbre targets. The reconnaissance has identified promising geological features, such as breccia zones and stockwork veinlets, which suggest potential porphyry-style mineralization. This development could enhance the company’s exploration strategy and strengthen its position in the mineral-rich Filo Del Sol district.

More about Mogotes Metals Inc.

Mogotes Metals Inc. is a mineral exploration company focusing on copper and gold in the Vicuña district of Argentina and Chile. Its flagship project, Filo Sur, is adjacent to the significant Filo del Sol copper-gold-silver discovery and is part of a mineral-rich belt that includes other notable deposits.

YTD Price Performance: -13.79%

Average Trading Volume: 333,841

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: C$25.24M

data.title: VEON Secures USD 210 Million Term Loan, Enhancing Financial Flexibility
data.description:
An announcement from VEON ( (VEON) ) is now available.

On March 27, 2025, VEON Ltd. announced the successful syndication of a 24-month, USD 210 million senior unsecured term loan from a consortium of international lenders, including ICBC Standard Bank and leading GCC banks. This new financing strengthens VEON’s liquidity position and enhances its financial flexibility, reflecting strong market confidence in the company’s strategy and financial health.

More about VEON

VEON is a digital operator providing converged connectivity and digital services to nearly 160 million customers across six countries. The company focuses on technology-driven services that empower individuals and drive economic growth, and it is listed on NASDAQ.

data.title: Barclays Discloses Positions in Dalata Hotel Group
data.description:
Barclays ( (GB:BARC) ) has issued an update.

Barclays PLC has disclosed its positions and dealings in the securities of Dalata Hotel Group PLC, as required under the Irish Takeover Panel Act. The disclosure reveals Barclays’ interests and short positions in Dalata’s securities, highlighting a total interest of 1.21% and short positions of 1.23%. This announcement is part of regulatory compliance and provides transparency to stakeholders about Barclays’ involvement with Dalata, potentially impacting market perceptions and investor decisions.

More about Barclays

Barclays PLC is a major global financial services provider engaged in retail banking, credit cards, corporate and investment banking, and wealth management. The company operates in over 40 countries and serves more than 48 million customers and clients worldwide.

data.title: M Vest Water Secures Qualification for Water Treatment Solutions at World’s Largest Offshore Oilfield
data.description:
M Vest Water AS ( (DE:7YA) ) has shared an update.

M Vest Water has announced that Saudi Aramco will qualify its NORWAFLOC® chemicals and NORWAPOL® filters at Safaniya, the world’s largest offshore oilfield. This qualification, achieved in just half a year, is a significant milestone for MVW, potentially boosting its commercialization efforts across the Middle East. The pilot project at Safaniya will treat 1,000 barrels per day, and successful qualification could lead to the adoption of MVW’s environmentally friendly solutions in other Saudi Aramco fields, addressing the growing need for improved water treatment due to tightening regulations.

More about M Vest Water AS

M Vest Water is an environmental technology company that develops unique, non-toxic, and biodegradable products and solutions for the water treatment industry, serving both industrial and municipal markets. The company is listed on Euronext Growth under the ticker MVW.

YTD Price Performance: 11.11%

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

data.title: Smith & Nephew Announces Share Awards Under Deferred Bonus and Global Plans
data.description:
Smith & Nephew Snats ( (SNN) ) just unveiled an update.

On March 26, 2025, Smith & Nephew plc announced the granting of awards under its Deferred Share Bonus Plan and Global Share Plan 2020. These awards, based on the company’s 2024 performance, involve deferred shares for executive directors and PDMRs, with vesting periods extending to 2028. This initiative aligns with the company’s strategy to incentivize management and align their interests with shareholders, potentially impacting the company’s market positioning and stakeholder confidence.

More about Smith & Nephew Snats

Smith & Nephew plc is a global medical technology company that specializes in the production of advanced medical devices, including orthopaedic reconstruction, advanced wound management, and sports medicine products. The company is focused on improving patient outcomes and operates within the healthcare industry.
